summary: Playwright smoke test could not start Chromium in this environment, so the Kanban assertions did not run.
steps: run one short headless Node script importing `{ chromium }` from `playwright`

failures.expected: Headless Chromium launches so the script can navigate to http://127.0.0.1:7089/ and run the requested assertions with no console errors.
failures.actual: Playwright browser startup failed immediately. Chromium exited with a macOS permission error: `bootstrap_check_in ... MachPortRendezvousServer ... Permission denied (1100)`.
